index.altbaslik: All commands, what they do and how to use them

arsiv.silme_engellendi: Deletion blocked — data moved to archive
arsiv.silme_kurali: Rule: No data is ever deleted. Everything is archived with a note.
arsiv.calisma_alani: Temporary work happens in the working area
arsiv.ana_dizin_temiz: No temporary files are left in the root directory

korumalar.sunucu_disari: This command reaches outside the permitted project directory. Other customers' sites live on this server and must not be touched.
korumalar.depo_gizli: All repositories are private. If one must be opened, do it manually from the repository interface.
korumalar.iz_bulundu: A tool trace was found in the written file. No traces are left in code, comments or documentation.
korumalar.kasa_kilitli: The vault is locked. A password is required to continue.
korumalar.yikici_komut: This command performs an irreversible operation.

faz.kapi_acik: Gate open — you may proceed to the next phase
faz.kapi_kapali: Gate closed — fix the issues first

hatalar.dil_bulunamadi: Language file not found, fell back to Turkish
